titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 1344

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=988 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 10:59:47.494623+00 | translation moa=989 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 10:59:47.484756+00

p.cl:
Rogerus . dei Gratia Ecclesie Sancti Andree minister Humilis . Dilectis et fidelibus suis . Magistro Ranulfo eiusdem
Ecclesie Archidiacono et Officialibus suis salutem et benedictionem .

Mandamus uobis . quatinus Cartas ob reuerentiam
Gloriosi Confessoris Cuthberti Dilectis filiis nostris . Priori et Monachis Dunelmen' a nobis indultas . in Comuni Ca
pituli nostri audientia legi et audiri faciatis . Vt si forte aliqua necessitas processu temporis super hoc emerserit
uos una cum prefato Capitulo nostro super ipsa concessione nostra testimonium perhibeatis ueritati .
Roger, by the grace of God humble servant of the church of St Andrews, to his own beloved and sworn men, Master Ranulf, archdeacon of the same church, and his officials, greeting and blessing.

We command you that out of respect for Cuthbert the glorious confessor, the charters granted to our sons, the prior and monks of Durham, you cause to be read and heard in the common hearing of our chapter, so that if by chance any problem about it should emerge during the passage of time, you with our aformentioned chapter may bear witness to the truth of this our concession.
